summary: Iteration 2 verification of the Guillaume Girishya portfolio. All 5 backend pytest cases pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All 37 frontend Playwright assertions pass — hero status badge text, hero 'Work mode' row (Onsite · Remote · Hybrid), About real headshot (customer-assets URL), 3 work-mode chips in Contact (work-mode-onsite/remote/hybrid), exactly 5 project cards with correct titles + demo/github links per spec (BearChat .mp4 + 'Watch demo' label + GH; Founderverse foundervers.com + NO GH; Juxprynx + GH; Marriott Mariott-Homes-and-Villas + GH; Netflix Netflix-Movie-Suggestion + GH), contact happy-path post + form clear + success toast, and empty-submit JS toast 'Please fill in every field.' now reachable (noValidate confirmed working).

minor.issue: Endpoint is public — anyone can read every contact submission. Acceptable for a personal portfolio, but flag for awareness.

critical_code_review_comments: Iter-1 finding fixed: form now has noValidate so the JS 'Please fill in every field.' toast path is reachable — confirmed at runtime.
Iter-1 finding fixed: PROFILE.status & PROFILE.workModes are read from data/portfolio.js and rendered in Hero + Contact as required.
Projects.jsx correctly conditions github/demo blocks and falls back demo label to 'Live site' when demoLabel is absent (verified: card 0 shows 'Watch demo', cards 2/3/4 show 'Live site').
server.py logger is still declared after route definitions — works due to Python late binding but remains a code smell (carried over from iter 1, optional cleanup).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: One TEST_-prefixed contact_message inserted via the public flow during Playwright (TEST_PlaywrightIter2). Plus prior TEST_Alice from pytest. Safe to leave or purge from contact_messages collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py (5 tests, all passing). Frontend testids of interest: hero-status-badge, about-portrait-wrap, work-mode-{onsite,remote,hybrid}, project-card-0..4, project-{N}-demo-link, project-{N}-github-link, contact-form (noValidate), contact-{name,email,message}-input, contact-submit-button. Iteration 2 changes (real headshot, status copy, work-mode chips, 5 rewritten projects, BearChat .mp4 'Watch demo', Founderverse foundervers.com no-GH) are all verified live.
rca of the issue: No new issues found in iteration 2. The iteration-1 contact-form validation bug is resolved by adding noValidate on the <form>; Playwright confirms the sonner toast 'Please fill in every field.' now fires on empty submit.
